channel.title: Personal on Azure Readiness starts here...
channel.description: Recent content in Personal on Azure Readiness starts here...

item.title: I found me another challenge: The Conqueror
item.description: Hi there, If you wonder why it’s been a bit quite on the blog front, it’s because I enjoyed 2 weeks off from work, distracting a bit from Azure, technology and spending some needed family time. Bonus was that these 2 weeks probably had the nicest weather of the whole year (although my wife would argue on that, since she is more into snow and cold, not the humid hot sweaty weather we had).
